notes: would pay someone to fix the deploy right now

messages.content: vercel build failed again: 'Module not found: Can't resolve @/lib/db'

The alias `@/` resolves locally through your tsconfig paths but the build uses a different base. I've added the paths mapping to the build config so Vercel resolves it the same way. Push and redeploy.
new error now, something about edge runtime and node modules
Your db client can't run on the edge runtime. I've forced the affected routes to the Node runtime with `export const runtime = 'nodejs'`. That removes the edge conflict. Redeploy.
